proto_schema.description: File descriptor set, generated by protoc. To generate, use protoc with imports and source info included. For an example test.proto file, the following command would put the value in a new file named out.pb. $ protoc --include_imports --include_source_info test.proto -o out.pb Structure is [documented below](#nested_proto_schema).

proto_descriptors.description: Base64 encoded content of the file.

schema_bundle_id.description: The unique name of the schema bundle in the form `[_a-zA-Z0-9][-_.a-zA-Z0-9]*`.

instance.description: The name of the instance to create the schema bundle within.

table.description: The name of the table to create the schema bundle within.

ignore_warnings.description: If true, allow backwards incompatible changes.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
